pages.title: Alhaji Tioluwalase "Baba Muyi" Majekodunmi
pages.description: A living archive for family history, enterprise, transport heritage, public memories, documentary material, and the values Baba Muyi carried through his life.
pages.body: This homepage introduces the archive’s purpose, principles, featured sections, and timeline preview for visitors.

cards.title: Family stewardship
cards.description: Preserving family memory with care, consent, and context.

cards.title: Enterprise
cards.description: Documenting the work, transport ventures, and people connected to the business.

cards.title: Service
cards.description: Recording community contribution, counsel, and leadership.

cards.title: Faith
cards.description: Honouring values and lessons that shaped Baba Muyi's life.

pages.title: Full biography
pages.description: A chapter-led biography prepared for family-approved writing, photographs, source notes, and documentary references.
pages.body: Biography chapters are being carefully prepared for publication with source notes, family review, and appropriate permissions.

cards.title: Early life and family roots
cards.description: Birthplace, lineage, education, childhood stories, and formative influences.

cards.title: Enterprise and transport work
cards.description: Bolekaja, Molue history, routes, staff, and community impact.

cards.title: Later years and legacy
cards.description: Family reflections, values, faith, counsel, and future lessons.

pages.title: Interactive timeline
pages.description: Milestones support dates, locations, categories, media attachments, source notes, and publication state.
pages.body: Verified milestones from Baba Muyi’s life will appear here as the archive develops.

pages.title: Documentary centre
pages.description: Manage documentaries, episodes, trailers, transcripts, subtitles, chapters, and streaming-provider playback IDs.
pages.body: Documentary material will be organised here with episodes, transcripts, viewing notes, and approved playback references.

cards.title: Episodes
cards.description: Episode metadata, chapters, release status, thumbnails, and playback IDs.

cards.title: Transcripts
cards.description: Searchable transcripts with timestamps and family-approved corrections.

cards.title: Production notes
cards.description: Interview logs, credits, contributors, permissions, and review status.

pages.title: Photo gallery
pages.description: Albums organise portraits, family images, transport photographs, scanned documents, and community submissions.
pages.body: Every image should have caption, alt text, copyright owner, privacy state, verification status, and source notes before publication.

cards.title: Portraits
cards.description: Approved portraits and captions.

cards.title: Family
cards.description: Private-first family photographs.

cards.title: Transport heritage
cards.description: Bolekaja and Molue images by route, vehicle, era, and contributor.

pages.title: Family tree
pages.description: A private-first family graph for relationships, photos, life dates, notes, and publication permissions.
pages.body: Family records will be handled carefully with privacy, consent, and special protection for living people.

pages.title: Lessons and values
pages.description: A curated collection of principles, advice, stories, and teachable moments for future generations.
pages.body: Lessons can link to biography chapters, stories, media, contributors, and documentary clips.

pages.title: Blog
pages.description: Archive notes, curator updates, essays, documentary announcements, and historical context.
pages.body: Legacy articles and historical reflections will be published here.

pages.title: Video and audio archive
pages.description: A searchable home for clips, interviews, voice notes, audio memories, and archival video references.
pages.body: Archive records track media type, storage bucket or external URL, privacy state, contributor, captions, transcripts, and deletion metadata.

pages.title: Share a Memory
pages.description: Public memories are submitted for review before publishing, with consent and moderation built into the workflow.
pages.body: Testimonials remain private until reviewed and approved by an authorised editor.

pages.title: Contact the archive
pages.description: A route for family, contributors, documentary participants, and future platform enquiries.
pages.body: Contact routes will support family, contributors, documentary participants, and archive enquiries.

pages.title: About Baba Muyi Legacy and LegacyHub
pages.description: Baba Muyi Legacy is the first flagship archive created with LegacyHub.
pages.body: Baba Muyi Legacy is the first flagship archive created with LegacyHub, a platform designed to help families, communities and institutions preserve and share meaningful histories.

cards.title: Family histories
cards.description: LegacyHub supports family histories, parents, grandparents, and multi-generational memories.

cards.title: Leaders and founders
cards.description: Archive community leaders, entrepreneurs, founders, veterans, and cultural contributors.

cards.title: Institutions and organisations
cards.description: Support cultural institutions, organisations, and living or deceased legacy subjects.
